zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale於1096年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特時，他的父親Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton34歲，母親Agnes Waltheg32歲。他於大約1154年與Euphemia d'Aumale在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1143年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale于1096年出生在苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton34岁，母亲Agnes Waltheg32岁。他于大约1154年与Euphemia d'Aumale在苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1143年在英国苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale was born in 1096, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Waltheg, was 32. He married Euphemia d'Aumale about 1154, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1143, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale est né en 1096, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Waltheg, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia d'Aumale environ 1154, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1143, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale 1096 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton 34 und seine Mutter Agnes Waltheg 32. Er hat um 1154 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Euphemia d'Aumale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1143 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale è nato il nel 1096 nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Waltheg, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia d'Aumale circa 1154, nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1143, nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandaleが1096年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skeltonは34歳，母Agnes Walthegは32歳であった。約1154年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトでEuphemia d'Aumaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1143年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale(이)가 1096년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Waltheg(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1154년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 Euphemia d'Aumale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1143년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale nasceu em 1096, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Waltheg, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia d'Aumale aproximadamente 1154, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1143, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale родился в 1096 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Waltheg, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia d'Aumale около 1154 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1143 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert De Bruce 2nd Lord of Annandale nació en 1096, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes Waltheg, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Euphemia d'Aumale aproximadamente 1154, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1143, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
